bug_report.summary: Create New Login: website address helper text panel is blank/empty
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the helper/info text area to the right of the “Website address” field.
expected_behaviors: The helper/info text for the Website address field is displayed (e.g., guidance about matching the exact website address).
actual_behaviors: The helper/info text area renders as an empty box with no text.

false_positive_reasons: Code-induced GUI difference leading to replay mismatch

bug_report.summary: Create New Login: Website address field is not focused by default after clicking “Create New Login”
steps_to_reproduce: Check which control receives keyboard focus immediately after the form opens.
expected_behaviors: Keyboard focus is placed in the “Website address” input (blue focus ring/caret present) so the user can start typing immediately.
actual_behaviors: The “Website address” input is not focused (no blue focus ring/caret), requiring an extra click before typing.

bug_report.summary: Create New Login: Website address input focus styling appears incorrect/inconsistent (blue focus ring missing) after focusing the field
steps_to_reproduce: Focus the “Website address” field (e.g., triple-click it).
expected_behaviors: The focused Website address input shows the standard, clearly visible focus styling (consistent with other focused inputs on the page).
actual_behaviors: The Website address input no longer shows the same prominent blue focus ring seen before; focus styling appears changed/muted (purple/grey outline), reducing focus clarity.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — predicted an non-executed action as executed

bug_report.summary: Create New Login: Clicking Save does not create a login; form remains with 'Please fill out this field' for Website address and sidebar stays at 0 logins
steps_to_reproduce: Fill Website address, Username, and Password.
expected_behaviors: The new login is saved and appears in the sidebar list (count increments).
The details view for the saved login is shown (with Edit/Remove actions), rather than staying on the create form.
actual_behaviors: After clicking Save, the page remains on the “Create New Login” form.
Website address is treated as empty and shows a required-field validation message (“Please fill out this field.”).
No login is created; sidebar shows 0 logins and no saved entry.

false_positive_reasons: GUI element location or interaction error (non-deterministic behavior)
